name: Yuuna Yuuki
description: A second-year in middle school and member of the Hero Club. She prides herself on being a hero, helping out others in needs and always remaining optimistic. She fights the Vertex with her armored gauntlets and greaves. Her fairy familiar, Gyuuki, allows her to condense energy in her fist for her signature move "Hero Punch".

name: Fido
description: Fido is an M101 Barrett Scavenger Drone of the Spearhead Squadron. As a Scavenger, Fido provides aid to the squadron by resupplying ammunition and recharging energy packs, as well as finding and extracting materials from abandoned or destroyed units. He has accompanied Shinei Nouzen in his battles across the Eastern Front and beyond, making him Shin's oldest surviving companion.

name: Grimm
description: She's an archbishop. She rides in a wheelchair due to a curse accidentally placed on her by herself that does not allow her to wear shoes.

name: Tsubame Mizusaki
description: Asakusa’s classmate who is a charismatic amateur model and is famous in the school. She is expected to be an actress in the future as both of her parents are actors, but she actually wants to be an animator and is especially good at capturing motion of characters. As Mizusaki has been banned from joining Anime Club by her parents, she joins Eizoken instead and starts to create anime together with Asakusa and Kanamori. She has different sense of money from two of them as she comes from a rich fam

name: Miki Naoki
description: Miki Naoki is one of the main characters of the Gakkou Gurashi! series. She is a second year student of Megurigaoka High School. She eventually joins the School Life Club as the youngest member after being rescued during the members' outing to the mall. Miki is very polite and kind, as she uses the honorifics and calls her seniors "senpai". Though she is usually quiet, Miki is very caring and supportive, as she comforts her friends when they feel down, and gives them words of encouragement when

name: Oguro Iwao
description: __Height:__ 185 cm (6'1") __Occupation:__ Vigilante __Quirk:__ Quirkless Knuckleduster is an individual with a strong sense of justice and drive to do the right thing. He prefers to punch first and ask questions later, as he is willing to beat up people he deems to look suspicious on the slim chance that they may be villains, forcing his teammates to hold him back before he goes too far. Despite this, he has proven to be more intelligent and smart than he seems to be at first.

name: Shiina
description: Shiina is a "self-proclaimed female ninja" who fights with traditional Japanese weapons such as dual-wielding kodachi and shuriken. Shiina also wears the special uniform of the SSS, along with a long black scarf covering the bottom part of her face and her neck. Her skirt is slightly different from the usual, as it has two short slits which is probably to aid her in movement. She usually puts up a tough and quiet front, but she is extremely fond of cute things, especially stuffed animals. She is

name: Genkai
description: She trains Yusuke in the Spirit Light Wave Fist (Reikō Hadō Ken) aka the Spirit Wave in the English dub and coaches him to the extreme. Though she may appears nasty towards Yusuke and the others, she truly cares about all of them, and tries to lead them down the right road. Genkai is an elderly martial arts expert who lives alone in a very large temple. name: Kanade Hisaishi
description: __Instrument:__ Euphonium Kanade Hisaishi is a new first-year at Kitauji High School. She joins the band as a euphonium player in Kumiko's second year. Kanade has a courteous personality and great communication skills, and gives off a good impression to everyone who sees her. However, she has a secret side to her always-polite demeanor. Kumiko describes her as a "hypocritical courtesy" or a girl who is "superficially polite but rude in intent".
mediaTitles: Sound! Euphonium: The Movie - Our Promise: A Brand New Day

name: Latina
description: She is a girl of magical descent and [Dale](https://anilist.co/character/137629) finds her abandoned in a forest. The details of her previous life are unknown. She is honest and kind and very smart. She soon becomes an idol for the adventurers who come to the inn. To hide her horns, she wears ribbons in her hair.

description: Height: 12 cm Weight: 175 g Mii-kun is the mummy Sora keeps. He likes dog food and apple slices.

name: Kei Uzuki
description: __Height:__ 179 cm Uzuki, also known as Slur, is a killer seeking to overthrow the JAA. Roughly around the same time [Tarou Sakamoto](https://anilist.co/character/196522)'s bounty was put up, Uzuki murdered a quarter of the assassin industry. The Order deemed him "X" as he leaves a large red 'X' at the scene of his crimes. In chapter 104 ~![Database](https://anilist.co/character/288222) reveals Uzuki's full name and part of his past.!~ (Source: Sakamoto Days Wiki)

This has caused him to enter numerous fights, because he couldn't understand the physical pain that he dealt to other people. name: Cibo
description: Cibo is a main character in the manga BLAME! by Tsutomu Nihei. She is the head scientist of the Electronic Corporation in the Capitol and joins Killy on his quest for the Net Terminal Gene. Killy 's first encounter with Cibo is in the lower levels of the Corporation in The Capitol, where she has been imprisoned for attempting to access the Net Sphere with an artificially created version of Net Terminal Genes. description: University student. She works part-time as a senior at the bookstore where Yuuta works. As a caring senior, she supports Yuuta's "relationship with his younger sister".
